title: IGNs Top 25 Anime Characters of All Time list
display_title: IGNs Top 25 Anime Characters of All Time list
wikitext:
[]: IGN's Top 25 Anime Characters of All Time list             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Oct 21, 2009 1:51 pm Sorry if someone already posted this. http://movies.ign.com/articles/103/1036651p1.html It's looks like Shinji and Rei made it on the list. I really disargee with the #1 choice on the list though.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Oct 21, 2009 1:58 pm I guess it is... Goku!

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Oct 21, 2009 2:01 pm It was a decent list but I feel like Rei was place too high on the list IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Oct 21, 2009 2:02 pm wow, how surprising! Who woulda thought Goku would be no1? Also, Shinji 25 with shitty description? lol fail oh well it's IGN

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 21, 2009 2:23 pm Wow, if IGN paid the slightest bit of attention to the series, they'd know Yui was killing Sachi in that scene, not Shinji. The summary of him all around is just . I remember a similar listing on some non-anime related site a few years back, I forget what site and all that, but it was a similar situation where the site was just playing favorites as well as being inaccurate in their character information as well as their voting. I wouldn't worry too much about it though.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Oct 21, 2009 2:45 pm It seems like the editors of IGN are fans of NGE since the series was #10 on their top 100 animated series list. I do argee the summary of Shinji is rather crappy.

[]:             Quote Post by Psychodrake » Wed Oct 21, 2009 2:59 pm Yeah I'm fairly sure it was a berserk Unit 01, not Shinji, that beat the crap out of Sachiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Boredom » Wed Oct 21, 2009 3:18 pm N-no Asuka???

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Oct 21, 2009 3:50 pm Yo Goku, really happy for you, let you finish, etc., blah blah, Piper Lou is the greatest anime character of all time².

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Oct 21, 2009 4:39 pm naruto made the list. I think that voids the legitimacy of the entire thing

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Oct 21, 2009 4:48 pm Also, Naruto above Edward Elric? This list is based on popular anime characters in the USA most likely. The list also lacks Kenshiro too.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Wed Oct 21, 2009 5:24 pm that list just made me face-palm all the way down

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Wed Oct 21, 2009 5:25 pm It also lacks Dio Brando WRYYYYYYYY!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Oct 21, 2009 5:33 pm ^I argee with that so much but too bad JJBA is not popular in the USA. This is probably based off today's popular stuff in America which is why characters like Dio, Kenshiro, and Dark Schneider are not on the list.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Wed Oct 21, 2009 5:39 pm When will these fools ever learn? Dark needs love too dammit!!

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Oct 21, 2009 6:17 pm Pikachu beat the Eva characters on this list!?! For shame IGN, for shame...

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Wed Oct 21, 2009 7:00 pm I thought their description of Rei was rather adequate.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Oct 21, 2009 7:01 pm Luffy is only one place ahead of Lelouch? I don't think so.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Wed Oct 21, 2009 7:07 pm How the hell does Shinji make the list, yet Asuka is ignored? She may be annoying, but she's honestly one of the major characters who bring comic relief and conflict.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Oct 21, 2009 7:34 pm I'm quite surprised that Spike Spiegel wasn't numbah 1.

[]: IGN's Top 25 Anime Characters of All Time list             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Oct 21, 2009 1:51 pm Sorry if someone already posted this. http://movies.ign.com/articles/103/1036651p1.html It's looks like Shinji and Rei made it on the list. I really disargee with the #1 choice on the list though.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Oct 21, 2009 1:58 pm I guess it
